description: Triggers when the user wants to create programmatic videos with React/Remotion — social clips, OG preview videos, intro animations, product showcases
should_trigger: Create a Remotion composition for a 15-second Instagram Reel intro animation
How do I set up Remotion v4 in my existing Next.js project?
Build a programmatic OG preview video for my blog posts using Remotion
How do I use spring() and interpolate() for smooth animations in Remotion?
Render a Remotion video server-side using @remotion/renderer in a Next.js API route
Create a social clip composition that accepts dynamic props via Zod schema
How do I embed a Remotion Player component in my React app?
should_not_trigger: Add CSS animations with Framer Motion to my landing page
Embed a YouTube video in my Next.js page
Create a GIF from an image sequence using FFmpeg
Set up a video background on my hero section
